approved_actions: Rotate credentials for exposed service account

execution.description: Force password rotation on targeted service account
execution.message: Dry-run — set LAB_AD_ENABLED=true in backend/.env for live AD execution

execution.description: Disable RC4 Kerberos encryption domain-wide (AES128+256 only)
execution.message: Dry-run — set LAB_AD_ENABLED=true in backend/.env for live AD execution

execution.description: Review and remove exposed SPN from service account
execution.command:
Get-ADUser -Identity 'svc-sql' -Properties ServicePrincipalName -Server 'SERVER01' | Select-Object Name,SamAccountName,ServicePrincipalName
# Remove exposed SPN after review:
# Set-ADUser -Identity 'svc-sql' -ServicePrincipalNames @{} -Server 'SERVER01'
execution.message: Dry-run — set LAB_AD_ENABLED=true in backend/.env for live AD execution

execution.description: Investigate and revoke active sessions for source user
execution.command:
Get-ADUser -Identity 'lab.test' -Properties LastLogonDate,LockedOut -Server 'SERVER01' | Format-List
# Force logoff via SOAR / Reset-ComputerMachinePassword if needed
execution.message: Dry-run — set LAB_AD_ENABLED=true in backend/.env for live AD execution
